Contents

  • Classes

  • Constructors
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.ISO3166
    Moved to ISO3166. Use TerminologyMapper for new code.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping
    Moved to Mapping. Use TerminologyMapper for new code.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.RaceAndEthnicity
    Moved to RaceAndEthnicity. Use TerminologyMapper for new code.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Units
    Moved to Units. Use TerminologyMapper for new code.
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.RaceAndEthnicity.US_CORE_ETHNICITY
    Use RaceAndEthnicity.US_CORE_ETHNICITY directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.RaceAndEthnicity.US_CORE_RACE
    Use RaceAndEthnicity.US_CORE_RACE directly.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.ISO3166.name(String)
    Use GeoMapper.lookupCountry(String, String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.ISO3166.threeLetterCode(String)
    Use ISO3166.threeLetterCode(String) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.ISO3166.twoLetterCode(String)
    Use GeoMapper.normalizeCountry(String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.addCodes(CodeSystem, String[])
    Use Mapping.addCodes(CodeSystem, String[]) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.createNamingSystem(CodeSystem)
    Use Mapping.createNamingSystem(CodeSystem) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.getDisplay(String, String)
    Use DisplayNameResolver.getDisplay(String, String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.getDisplay(Coding)
    Use DisplayNameResolver.getDisplay(String, String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.getMapping(String)
    Use ConceptTranslator.mapCode(String, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.hasDisplay(String, String)
    Use DisplayNameResolver.hasDisplay(String, String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.loadCodeSystemFromCsv(String)
    Use Mapping.loadCodeSystemFromCsv(String) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.loadConceptMapFromCsv(String, String)
    Use Mapping.loadConceptMapFromCsv(String, String) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.map(Coding)
    Use Mapping.map(Coding) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.mapSystem(Identifier)
    Use NamingSystemResolver.normalizeSystem(String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.mapTableNameToSystem(String)
    Use NamingSystemResolver.v2TableUri(String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.reset(CodeableConcept)
    Use Mapping.reset(CodeableConcept) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.reset(Coding)
    Use Mapping.reset(Coding) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.reset(Type)
    Use Mapping.reset(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Type) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.setDisplay(Coding)
    Use Mapping.setDisplay(Coding) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.updateCodeLookup(Coding)
    Use DisplayNameResolver.setDisplay(String, String, String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping.v2Table(String)
    Use NamingSystemResolver.v2TableUri(String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.RaceAndEthnicity.setEthnicityCode(CodeableConcept, Extension)
    Use DemographicsMapper.mapEthnicity(String, String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.RaceAndEthnicity.setRaceCode(CodeableConcept, Extension)
    Use DemographicsMapper.mapRace(String, String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.addNamingSystem(String, String...)
    Use TerminologyMapper instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.createNamingSystem(String, String)
    Use TerminologyMapper instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.getCodeSystemAliases()
    Use TerminologyMapper instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.getNamingSystem(String)
    Use TerminologyMapper.getNamingSystem(String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.getSystemNames(String)
    Use TerminologyMapper instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.toOid(String)
    Use NamingSystemResolver.toOid(String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.toTextName(String)
    Use TerminologyMapper instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.toUri(String)
    Use NamingSystemResolver.toUri(String) instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Systems.updateNamingSystem(NamingSystem, String)
    Use TerminologyMapper instead.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Units.isUcum(String)
    Use Units.isUcum(String) directly.
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Units.toUcum(String)
    Use UnitMapper.mapUnit(String) instead.
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping(String)
    use Mapping
